Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.TokenWriter

Packages that use TokenWriter
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API

  • Uses of TokenWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that implement TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborTokenWriter
    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the CBOR format (RFC 8949).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that return TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.binary(byte[] value)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.bool(boolean value)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.endArray()
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.endObject()
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.fieldName(String name)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.nil()
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.number(double value)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.number(long value)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.number(Number value)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.number(BigDecimal value)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.number(BigInteger value)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.object(Object value)
     
    TokenWriter
    CborSerializer.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Convenience delegator that opens a CborTokenWriter over the output using default session arguments (mirrors OutputStreamSerializer.serialize(Object)).
    TokenWriter
    CborSerializerSession.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level push generator that emits CBOR (RFC 8949) one structural event at a time, bound to this live session.
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.startArray()
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.startObject()
     
    TokenWriter
    CborTokenWriter.string(String value)
     

  • Uses of TokenWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs that return TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TokenWriter
    JcsSerializer.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Convenience delegator (default session args) for the raw-JSON token writer.
    TokenWriter
    JcsSerializerSession.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level push generator that emits raw JSON (NOT canonical JCS) one structural event at a time, with the object(Object) POJO bridge disabled (the walker would emit ordinary JSON, not canonical JCS).

  • Uses of TokenWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json that implement TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonTokenWriter
    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the JSON format.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json that return TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.binary(byte[] value)
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.bool(boolean value)
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.endArray()
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.endObject()
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.fieldName(String name)
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.nil()
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.number(double value)
     
    TokenWriter

    JsonTokenWriter.number(BigDecimal value)
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.number(BigInteger value)
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.object(Object value)
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonSchemaSerializer.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Convenience delegator (default session args) for the raw-JSON token writer.
    TokenWriter
    JsonSchemaSerializerSession.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level push generator that emits raw JSON (NOT schema) one structural event at a time, with the object(Object) POJO bridge disabled (the walker would emit the bean's own JSON, not its JSON Schema).
    TokenWriter
    JsonSerializer.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Convenience delegator that opens a JsonTokenWriter over the output using default session arguments (mirrors Serializer.serialize(Object, Object)).
    TokenWriter
    JsonSerializerSession.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level push generator that emits JSON one structural event at a time, bound to this session's live config.
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.startArray()
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.startObject()
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonTokenWriter.string(String value)

    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the JSONL / NDJSON format.

    JsonlTokenWriter.object(Object value)
     
    TokenWriter
    JsonlSerializerSession.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level push generator that emits JSONL one structural event at a time, with a trailing newline after every top-level value, bound to this live session.

    JsonlTokenWriter.startArray()

    JsonlTokenWriter.startObject()

  • Uses of TokenWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller that return TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static TokenWriter
    Cbor.ofTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter generator over the specified output using the Cbor.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static TokenWriter
    Jcs.ofTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter generator over the specified output using the Jcs.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static TokenWriter
    Json.ofTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter generator over the specified output using the Json.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static TokenWriter
    Json5.ofTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter generator over the specified output using the Json5.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static TokenWriter
    Json5l.ofTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter generator over the specified output using the Json5l.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static TokenWriter
    Jsonl.ofTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter generator over the specified output using the Jsonl.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static TokenWriter
    MsgPack.ofTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter generator over the specified output using the MsgPack.DEFAULT marshaller.
    TokenWriter
    Marshaller.writeTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level push generator that emits structural events one at a time.

  • Uses of TokenWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream that return TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.binary(byte[] value)
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_BINARY event.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.bool(boolean value)
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_BOOLEAN event.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.endArray()
    Emits a TokenType.END_ARRAY event.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.endObject()
    Emits a TokenType.END_OBJECT event.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.fieldName(String name)
    Emits a TokenType.FIELD_NAME event for the next field of the enclosing object.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.nil()
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_NULL event.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.number(double value)
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER event for a double.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.number(long value)
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER event for a long.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.number(Number value)
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER event for an arbitrary Number.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.number(BigDecimal value)
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER event for a BigDecimal.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.number(BigInteger value)
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER event for a BigInteger.
    default TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.object(Object value)
    Emits an arbitrary POJO through the format's structural events.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWritable.serializeTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter push generator targeting the specified output.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.startArray()
    Emits a TokenType.START_ARRAY event.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.startObject()
    Emits a TokenType.START_OBJECT event.
    TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.string(String value)
    Emits a TokenType.VALUE_STRING event.
    default TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.write(Object value)
    Implements RecordWriter.write(Object) by delegating to object(Object).
    default TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.writeExt(int type, byte[] payload)
    Emits a typed-binary value (signed type byte + binary payload).
    default TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.writeSimple(int value)
    Emits an opaque simple value.
    default TokenWriter
    TokenWriter.writeTag(long tagNumber)
    Emits a semantic tag prefixing the next value emit.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream with parameters of type TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    PojoWalker.walk(TokenWriter w, Object value)
    Walks the given value and emits its structure through the given writer using default options.
    static void
    PojoWalker.walk(TokenWriter w, Object value, PojoWalker.Options options)
    Walks the given value and emits its structure through the given writer using the supplied options.
    static RecordWriter
    StreamingArrayRecord.writer(TokenWriter cursor)
    Wraps a TokenWriter as a streaming array-element RecordWriter.

  • Uses of TokenWriter in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.rest.client with type arguments of type TokenWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RecordStreamBody
    RecordStreamBody.token(Consumer<TokenWriter> consumer)
    Creates a body that streams via a TokenWriter (fine-grained structural cursor) using the default JSON serializer.
    static RecordStreamBody
    RecordStreamBody.token(Serializer serializer, Consumer<TokenWriter> consumer)
    Creates a body that streams via a TokenWriter (fine-grained structural cursor) using the given serializer.

    Modifier and Type

    static RecordStreamBody
    RecordStreamBody.token(Consumer<TokenWriter> consumer)
    Creates a body that streams via a TokenWriter (fine-grained structural cursor).
